title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into a Deed of Usufruct with the Department of National Defense Represented by Secretary Carlito G. Galvez, Jr., for the Use of One Thousand Eight Hundred Twenty-four (1,824) Square Meters Land Inside Camp Macario Sakay in Barangay Lalakay, Los Baños, Laguna for the Construction and Establishment of an Urgent Care and Evacuation Center and Ratifying the Same
